job_listing.job_description: We need a manager to oversee $50k/month ad spends across Meta and Google. Must have experience in technical SEO and content strategy.

candidate_resume.summary: Marketing Specialist with 4 years of experience focusing on organic social media and small-scale ad campaigns.

experience.responsibilities: Managed $5k monthly budget and grew Instagram following by 40%.

suggested_interviewer_questions: The role requires managing $50k monthly; your experience lists $5k. How would you adjust your risk management for larger spends?
Can you walk me through a time you used GA4 data to pivot a failing campaign?

sample_candidate_responses.response: Scaling requires more frequent monitoring of CPA (Cost Per Acquisition). I would implement tighter automated rules to pause underperforming ads before they waste significant portions of the larger budget.

I noticed a high bounce rate on our landing page through GA4. By analyzing user paths, I realized the 'Shop Now' button was below the fold on mobile. I moved the CTA up, and we saw an immediate 15% increase in conversion without changing the ad creative.

must_flag: If the interviewer misses the significant gap in ad-spend management experience.

guardrail_checks.topic_lock: Professional interview and resume prep only.
